steps.title: Combine like terms
steps.content: Both terms have the same variable part, $x^3$, so subtract the coefficients and keep $x^3$: $$12x^3-5x^3=(12-5)x^3=7x^3.$$

steps.title: Confirm the choice
steps.content: $7x^3$ matches choice C. The exponent stays $3$ because like terms are combined by changing only the coefficient.
